title: Extended Warranties: The $40B Checkout Scam
hook: That 'protection plan' question at checkout is one of retail's most profitable tricks — and Americans fall for it to the tune of $40 billion every year.
angle: Most people assume extended warranties protect them, but 88% are never used and retailers pocket 50-80% as pure profit — plus most credit cards already include free purchase protection
audience: Anyone who has ever said yes at checkout to an extended warranty or device protection plan
key_numbers: $40 billion spent annually on extended warranties in the US
Only 12% of extended warranties are ever used
50-80% of extended warranty revenue is pure retailer profit
$8,000+ wasted per person over a lifetime of warranty purchases
Most premium credit cards include free purchase protection for 1-2 years
